entries.name: service-account-notify-rotation-due
entries.purpose: Weekly Mondays 08:00 UTC: enumerate SAs approaching expires_at within the warning window (default 14d) and dispatch ServiceAccountSecretRotationDueNotification to each Application's owners. Weekly cadence trades a slightly later warning for lower notification-volume; the 14-day window absorbs a single missed run.

entries.name: service-account-purge-expired
entries.purpose: Daily 04:00 UTC: two-pass sweep. Pass 1 soft-disables SAs past expires_at + grace_days_after_expiry. Pass 2 hard-deletes soft-deleted SAs past retention_hold_days. Critical for SOC 2 CC6.7 compliance — late execution risks breaching prompt-access-removal on SA expiry.

entries.name: service-account-update-last-used
entries.purpose: Every minute: flush the coalesced `svc:last_used:{id}` cache buffer to Postgres. Batches all pending updates into a single UPDATE...FROM (VALUES ...) so hot-path traffic doesn't pressure the SA table.

entries.name: service-account-detect-dormant
entries.purpose: Weekly Sundays 06:00 UTC: enumerate SAs unused for > `security.dormant_threshold_days` (default 30d) and dispatch ServiceAccountDormantNotification. Sunday timing so operators triage on Monday morning.

entries.name: service-account-active-count-gauge
entries.purpose: Every minute: emit `stackra.service_account.active_count` gauge for dashboarding.

entries.name: service-account-rotation-due-count-gauge
entries.purpose: Hourly: emit `stackra.service_account.rotation_due_count` gauge for the rotation-hygiene dashboard.

entries.name: service-account-expired-count-gauge
entries.purpose: Every 5 minutes: emit `stackra.service_account.expired_count` gauge. Non-zero for more than one purge cycle (24h) triggers ops alert — signals PurgeExpiredServiceAccountsJob is stalled.
